title: SRS View Definition (ext:views-l1)
description: A versioned presentation and export configuration over a field set. A View is compatible with any record containing its required fields.

id.description: Stable UUID for this View. Never changes across versions.

name.description: Machine-readable name within the namespace, kebab-case.

description.description: When to use this View; what workflow or audience it serves.

compatibleTypes.description: Optional semanticObjectType hints this View was designed for. Informational only; not a compatibility constraint.

fieldViews.description: Presentation configuration for each field. Fields omitted here are treated as visible: false.

protection.description: View-level workflow constraint. 'none' (default): no restriction. 'read-only': Records rendered through this View cannot be edited. 'fill-in': only null or empty field values may be populated.

aiGuidance.description: Guidance for AI agents using this View.

fieldId.description: Must reference a valid Field.id in the effective package set.

required.description: View-level workflow constraint; does not alter the Field contract.

visible.description: Default: true. A hidden field remains in the Record and may appear in other Views.

ExportConfig.description: Configuration for rendering a Record through this View as an exportable document.

format.description: Target output format. Portable values: 'markdown', 'adoc', 'html', 'text'. In section rendering context (ext:views-l2), DocumentView.format supersedes this value.

preamble.description: Template string rendered before field values. Standard variables: {{instance-id}}, {{date}}, {{status}}, {{namespace}}, {{name}}. In section rendering context, {{heading-3}} is also available (resolves to heading level 3 + depthOffset).

fieldOrder.description: Explicit export field ordering by fieldId. Defaults to fieldViews[].order.

omitEmptyFields.description: Default: false. When true, fields with no value are omitted from output.
